# luci-examples module
> commands.js
> **Total Context:** ~100272 tokens

## Recommended Entry Points

- [map.md](./map.md): Structural map for luci-examples that prioritizes quick orientation and symbol discovery. (~197 tokens, l3-skeleton)
- [bundled-reference.md](./bundled-reference.md): Sharded complete reference index for luci-examples with links to smaller part files. (~211 tokens, l4-monolith)
- [bundled-reference.part-01.md](./bundled-reference.part-01.md): Part 1 of the sharded complete reference for luci-examples when the full module exceeds the token budget. (~100136 tokens, l4-monolith-part)
- [bundled-reference.part-02.md](./bundled-reference.part-02.md): Part 2 of the sharded complete reference for luci-examples when the full module exceeds the token budget. (~421 tokens, l4-monolith-part)
